prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f3cdc58f`.
codex_response:
Implemented `f3cdc58f` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: count colors `1..4` in the `10x10` input, then draw bottom-aligned vertical bars for those counts in output columns `0..3`. The summary hint was used, because it matched all official examples; no correction note or added primitive was needed.

`[verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f3cdc58f/verifier.py)`, `[generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f3cdc58f/generator.py)`, and `[__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f3cdc58f/__init__.py)` are in place. The generator stays on-family by using a fixed black `10x10` canvas with sparse scattered singleton pixels for colors `1..4`, varying their counts and deriving the output histogram from that latent count vector.

Validation passed end to end: `4/4` official examples verified, `1000` generated examples were built, and the preview sheet looked visually on-distribution. Artifacts are at `[task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f3cdc58f/task.json)`, `[originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f3cdc58f/previews/originals.png)`, `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f3cdc58f/previews/preview_01.png)`, `[preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f3cdc58f/previews/preview_02.png)`, and `[preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f3cdc58f/previews/preview_03.png)`.
